testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: Best masala chai in the city! The ambiance is perfect for evening adda with friends. Highly recommend the samosas too!

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.text: Amazing paneer butter masala and butter naan! The food quality is top-notch and prices are very reasonable. Will definitely visit again.

testimonials.name: Anjali Patel
testimonials.text: Perfect spot for family dinners. The biryani is absolutely delicious and the staff is very courteous. Great value for money!

testimonials.name: Vikram Singh
testimonials.text: Love the filter coffee here! Reminds me of authentic South Indian taste. The vada pav is also a must-try.

testimonials.name: Sneha Reddy
testimonials.text: The dosas are crispy and perfectly made! Service is quick and the place is always clean. My go-to breakfast spot.

testimonials.name: Arjun Mehta
testimonials.text: Great variety of dishes. The chicken tikka is flavorful and the portions are generous. Ambiance could be better but food makes up for it.

testimonials.name: Kavya Iyer
testimonials.text: Absolutely love their cold coffee and sandwiches! Perfect place to work or study. Free WiFi is a bonus.

testimonials.name: Rohan Gupta
testimonials.text: The chole bhature here is amazing! Authentic taste and generous portions. Staff is friendly and service is prompt.

testimonials.name: Meera Nair
testimonials.text: Best place for evening snacks! The pakoras are crispy and the mint chutney is divine. Prices are pocket-friendly too.

testimonials.name: Aditya Kumar
testimonials.text: Good food and nice atmosphere. The dal makhani is creamy and delicious. Slightly crowded during weekends but worth the wait.

testimonials.name: Divya Joshi
testimonials.text: Their pav bhaji is to die for! Perfect blend of spices. The place has a cozy vibe and is great for casual meetups.

testimonials.name: Karan Malhotra
testimonials.text: Excellent food quality and hygiene standards. The tandoori items are perfectly cooked. Highly recommend for family dining.
